raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX : Merchant ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) mistakenly posted 5 charges of {$190.00} for a single purchase of {$190.00} across two credit cards. Started complaint with merchant but no reply. 
XX/XX/XXXX : Initiated dispute with Citi Bank for three erroneous charges. Provided thorough and clear documentation : -Invoice that shows a single booking and the non-citi card that the booking was paid with.

-Credit card statement from other card showing it was paid.

-Communication from the merchant confirming that a single tour was booked and the other charges were duplicates. 
XX/XX/XXXX : Citi Bank closed the dispute without contacting the merchant. 
Called citi reps 5 times ( I have recordings ) and all agreed that this case seems simple and should have been resolved in my favor and they will request to reopen the case. 
XX/XX/XXXX : Citi requested more information on the closed case. 
XX/XX/XXXX : Provided the requested information, and once again spoke to citi reps who confirmed the evidence I have provided is sufficient and verbal contract that the case will be reopened ( I have recordings ). 
XX/XX/XXXX : Documentation ignored, case reclosed without contacting the merchant. Called citi rep AGAIN and they told me " I don't know why the case worker isn't reading our notes ''.
